query:
-- Sum of custom items (productId = 0) that are excluded by INNER JOIN products
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as custom_item_count,
  SUM(oi.quantity) as custom_qty,
  SUM(oi.lineTotal) / 100.0 as custom_revenue_rupees,
  COUNT(DISTINCT oi.orderId) as orders_with_custom_items
FROM order_items oi
INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59'
  AND oi.productId = 0;

SELECT

  SUM(oi.quantity) as custom_qty,
  SUM(oi.lineTotal) / 100.0 as custom_revenue_rupees,
  COUNT(DISTINCT oi.orderId) as orders_with_custom_items
FROM order_items oi
INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59'
  AND oi.productId = 0;
